creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

Shortly before this PR was filed, the port was updated and
USE_DISPLAY=yes was added to it, which I believe should fix this
issue. I'm wondering if your tree was out of date when you encountered
this and if you could try updating and verify if the issue is resolved
or not.

Thanks,
Steve
